name: =?utf-8?Q?Delegate=20Dan=20Cox?=
subject: Merry Christmas to all 🎄🎆
body:
From our family to yours, Merry Christmas. | | | |
---
| | |
#### Merry Christmas!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
### _"For to us a child is born, to us a son is given; and the government shall be on his shoulder:
and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace."
Isaiah 9:6_

Friends,

Because of the Son given at Christmas we know that evil will not be victorious and government will always remain accountable to Wonderful Counselor. That's our national motto after all, One Nation Under God.

Do you want to laugh and be immensely encouraged? Watch Tucker's speech from last week. My daughter and campaign manager in our Victorious Primary, Patience Faith, recently got to hear this same message and call from the great Tucker Carlson at AmFest 2022 in Phoenix last week.

Tucker rocked the house. He said "Leaders who don't acknowledge an authority above themselves...is a recipe for total destruction. Period."[](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=98957b0ca5&e=5bb5efcda7)
[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=JFrRYSmZhDk](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=a861952c78&e=5bb5efcda7)

Those who advance a progressive (Marxist) statism that believes they can play God for us and our kids forget this fact - that nothing can ultimately stand against the truth.

Your voice of reason and faith is needed for good government and for strong families, communities and relationships which bring so much peace. We need to continue to liberate hearts and minds from the lack of diversity of thought in our beloved state government.

The issues of restoring freedom and protecting our families, businesses and our Bill of Rights which we ran our campaign on have not disappeared. They are more urgent now than ever.

Our campaign had the highest number of grassroots volunteers and $1.6 million raised from thousands of donors like you whose voices must now be heard in Annapolis and around our state. We will never let the Left silence us.

Let's fight on and never give up. We hope to update you soon as to our efforts to do so. Together, Maryland will be free.

God bless you and God bless our America.

_Merry Christmas,_

Delegate Dan Cox

P.S. If you are able to help us with an end of year gift to help us close out our campaign books and ensure we pay all the final bills, thank you! ([www.coxforfreedom.com](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=b68f059941&e=5bb5efcda7)). If there are any needs or prayer requests you have, please feel free to send them to our family at this e-mail and we will personally pray for you as a family.

---
|
---
| [Year-End Donation](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=3ae57e5fa8&e=5bb5efcda7 "Year-End Donation")
---

You are receiving this e-mail as a friend involved in making Maryland Great Again.

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan Cox for GovernorPO Box 762Frederick, MD 21705
[Add us to your address book](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bedb7a012e)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bedb7a012e&e=5bb5efcda7&c=62147cb3ba) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://coxforfreedom.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=bedb7a012e&e=5bb5efcda7&c=62147cb3ba).

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z419i01tlf54umsvfpt803pd9ethhl1dn0v2pv20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqs1a7s1etv08n5is5mvp2q7vbq9c4cmfe3vkql8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z08funn4pkbadip7ege3d33msgd78d5ge9nkihq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhdvviu6rgap05iedd4io19q4e2o48neghj3gtd0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4iq2mq2kahvous25fl29fcouig051r1voe76v7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs89hfr7dco81ph6q991f1plft5eirja8to4cato_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0cnare25ksnq6qb6bjfcg5b49ergr43vspvu8s8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9cks56bbo1qdjpo2uh1l0s795e6b50qr2kvupu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5fd8bflmnqotqn7l66r2omejk8jqqth68dl2ie8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp315shfaksa6e3sfo6ikd7ipq7ha4rg39i2toio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0lvg9up59atmo87ugvrjd80dqthp12p874anacg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3g023b5r7nuhm6njmb903jvqjsflkosetjjqen0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztuv6elndvjaerj9skppfmhnkp4nombfsl7ttjk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvr4pd2mejlmqfjs9gncv8m3cbocrpoaclfv24kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqjb6sdgam8iakbdt2h7m98eh6m2llnhn13dh3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqbar1nnlukp43c69o94fpii4v5vnf3vs6jm31ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zta1brse477k7c04nsm5fa04pi5de7i2pbdefjj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt8rvt3f2phb5vfd9c6ukgakrffapg10o0u3e0e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2z5hgv1qupqp4dcel6vnqkmvicjv36tcmguun92t0).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp4hv786bvi3dfi4jfhn80275stj0oi88arnleeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ku92klrk86n4kbecb1937jpt5kih5c2c5o0e80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp8nk7hj84fcu7a4l7ugf5p95p5nbs5p7jruong8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdfbtpaf6cmdo8af7elsbsgmgifsrnl82mrhnk0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeo78pkn5n355h58pr68rgm53tecvdh9v0lmb8m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhq6ugm4nsmqr8p6kt04o255baa6gvdnas9iaid0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp5cjgv437sl93lu706qqvtmndifaned6bsbv7e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cdh2bs)

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk.
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4k5kib0pj5qdbv5b3dc54897fclv4d8meu5ib0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrar0v2cqm39qnufaba1b58rg4tg03eht5uhrv2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpp2okdarv4381r3ng918776i1bv2tklr8a96p08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvb2mskel4sd00ks2iv33239q28s8t7eropitajo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: January 6 Peaceful Protesters BEG to get moved to Guantanamo Bay
body:
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7680%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=5pfcjFxNVS8YpF8ObSnVMw&sysid=1)
They’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment! No Mass or Sunday worship service. Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine. Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells! | | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98202%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iHxd2LkCSiHX0Gq1Vah0jQ&sysid=1)
---
| | |
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98203%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=coRMotgYohNXyMBKb801xw&sysid=1) Hi Patriot,

[Please give a crucial $10, $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98204%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vPr6nn6DgMWdvpAxQATx%2bQ&sysid=1)

I just read the urgent letter signed by 34 innocent Americans, jailed in Washington, D.C for peacefully protesting the stolen 2020 presidential election.

**Patriot, what’s being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they’re BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba ...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I’m heartsick and deeply angry about what’s being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they’re enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there’s more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There’s much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

**They conclude their letter by pleading to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, where the Taliban, al-Qaeda, and ISIS terrorists get better treatment!**

This can’t go on. I won’t allow it.

I’m Larry Klayman, the founder ofstrong Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama’s corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama’s illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I’m doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Patriot, please say a pray for the January 6 Prisoners. Their temptation to despair, to give up, must be enormous.

[Then I beg you to help me fight for them with your very best gift now of $10, $25, $50, $100, or even more. If you’ve given before, please give again. If you can, give more than you’ve ever given to Freedom Watch.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98215%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ayUzCcnWIW%2fmIhDsTNYw4Q&sysid=1)

I can’t do it without you, Patriot.

Thank you for doing whatever you can now.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Patriot, I’m heartbroken after reading that powerful letter from our fellow patriots who are rotting in jail in Washington, D.C. **These are innocent men and women, tortured and abused like they were political prisoners in a Third World dictatorship!**

[Please give what you can right now to help me fight to set them free. $5, $10, $25, $50, even more...whatever you can spare at this very moment. Each dollar counts.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98216%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kQ04vk9Ncg9HI%2fvENVCdbw&sysid=1)

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they’re often abused and beaten...they’re blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn’t commit.

[But there’s something you can do about it ...you can donate immediately to Freedom Watch’s critically important lawsuit to HELP FREE the rest of these persecuted patriots with your crucial gift today.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98217%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O00wDYhVqGk7zMuS1STfjg&sysid=1)
---

| Dear Friend,
It is such a wonderful time of year of giving and gathering with family and friends. I hope your holiday is spent surrounded by loved ones and filled with peace, joy and happiness.
Whether you celebrate Christmas, Hanukkah, Kwanzaa, or another special day, I hope you find peace and rest as our year comes to a close.
From my family to yours, I wish you a very Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays, and blessings in the New Year.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Rob Ortt

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Merry Christmas from the Mississippi Freedom Caucus
body:
|
---
| | |
---
|
## **The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is thankful for citizens like you, who never give in and never give up. **
## **2023 is going to be a great year for Mississippi.**
---
| These quotes have helped us remember what Christmas is all about. We hope you find them inspiring and thought provoking as we look forward to next year.
---
| | "Christmas is not a time nor a season, but a state of mind."Calvin Coolidge
---
"It's not how much we give but how much love we put into giving." Mother Theresa
---
| | "Christmas will always be as long as we stand heart to heart and hand in hand." Dr. Seuss
---
"Christmas isn't just a day, it's a frame of mind." Miracle on 34th Street
---
| | "Christmas is a season not only of rejoicing but of reflection." Winston Churchill
---
"Christmas is doing a little something extra for someone." Charles Schulz
---
| | "The best way to spread Christmas cheer is singing loud for all to hear."Will Ferrell, 'Elf'
---
"A good conscience is a continual Christmas."Benjamin Franklin
---
|
> "And know that I am with you always; yes, to the end of time."
> Jesus
---
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Cj5rrzSWnwOuoYYAv7MlJQ) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: American Update
subject: Reason with precision
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0232%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7SCQufHJeB96HMRTGi6qrA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44687%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RcBD2bI%2fFlaRyyq%2bRD%2fRYg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44688%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xrk7lGg9iCFOv8X9FQRgNQ&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44689%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hfEqaXb%2flK%2bZWd81YD9Dsg&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0232%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7SCQufHJeB96HMRTGi6qrA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0232%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=7SCQufHJeB96HMRTGi6qrA&sysid=1)

name: American Action News
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoabuukn5m6vd6u58b9ljmjct7173ir2qmh6j71g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zamcftda4b8ib2on1idcf0u2m3moo6j61clju9og_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z730u2cet0qioq9lgpfpupc4sban1267i8ves8d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrm2sh85j8tg1bmla5278afc3f9e1t473jlnsr00_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2fqt4gkrdpf78fu9gkvgsf4cu3kh428famtt5kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm2q7d09r6n408aas349ium7a2pslnj8hbeh36do_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1p5lbljflskjb931ljfea30r14f46g06bpa7tto_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvc97ti2d8d1g0mvdlhte2n4pm1jmnnfbm85uml8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqt1o100jdbujrpi9dqn743igcit6de394qsdopg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zs1qhj3f6ejbiapm85j3quk6dq46i0ippf5u39kg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeqbgieunejpcdhp7sgep2clhum73tbnj41hd4po_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7g9aai1kejhk2qll5qm7hoodkdaegf8k6diort8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj69sgt9gj2eomq9p4o25uq161j98r59vmgcldu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7g1tgn11fihkngksglbfiv9bvnvj66dd72tb5b8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhb09kbns500oaeam6kql47aghvasg44bsbdjjco_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpsdvd64k8qtease6800bs9ncm0odjlhk1h68fjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrdeo31kh36serdhsu9kpii28fmsi8e8fakmjqng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8ng2h6kgajo81keit1dbdqdj560jofor66sms38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7o4j66g4cij7fv0425qbmbrnjiffnvvljf175q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmmrordvfi2nsv31af3eaoh3dhp85vg95emh5r28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhk5mqt44upo7v4blqsjimpvbe6788vebjptlj8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zceio8cca7av41qb3pebtvv11hi3ocipoir211f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbtilbr3ec94ds6fd8rd5vria0m4i4lautraf6e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm6o32c3h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Trumptrainnews, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Defense News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjgtrkqau0lbi1pe1hucma6acbp5b70f741dm0so_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2gpa8kp6o48afibjq95ut4gg45dubliotuu2aeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztvov0h7vei4lntvfarh0nfu64pv8qu29bg6mao0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---

---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbohinogi5hd8f34bko85i5ep49fpsdpotjkk5sg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6c3h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8po9lqjmdkj684456f18ttq40m7pca19ancv6f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgouhrgjhus7kf0u3rmtr79ilnjujlhu9jkdf7jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdcvni4pucf3arcecu58hv7te184qfm11ooigk7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6i1v000eakm5cbvmqj66p3gf96fsfaht2ip68h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z64rssi0uej70g4h4v1l1ccvbf55vnbi78jfebn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuajnbi2fkki34p750h7d13ts84obbk7u5dd7dp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zgkjet5bmlkjkc1kb28bbbmjkpkr7okm7eqh2jl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3h7a0t4r71o152i6vt4in3klgpee73ttdhvcft8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znvvol7uovrja94v2qolbkb2pm1j1to1gra513f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z50igogm8p6e4t794lfc794fbs06i6do050js03o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmsd0s8ks1cq2fbrsebkpono9tqcqj4q9psapk1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbghkoqp3rjiqr8m2rdokfk6miscfgt1iv93vsgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjhm9or6cph2bs)

clean_body: But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0245%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4IJa4YwrND%2fXaY%2f2r8WoIQ&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44682%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pULhbZtxqrL59oU1VlMBUw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44683%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0rIgUhOHpv9WmPrG%2f%2b5ocA&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44684%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f0vZWzD%2fD%2fztUWF6LKkRMQ&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44695%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QrlkDZTtHw73CwmZ7cWkWQ&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0245%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=4IJa4YwrND%2fXaY%2f2r8WoIQ&sysid=1)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfvi3urnslk7op4595t6ae1a0aep86endief62co_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7dhm7vp7ouk3jh9iube6j0qpbc6ggo7kdgfugio_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1fuiatkg255cvai0s28lqa6b3jj9q25ckrj8ueg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5ietkvu4j6jlsthd9avn3cofh5m8c2q77lqfn4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za15agb9s94uvn2gbgp0nk32itldmerp55e57ac0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj517pfv82ii32nlkam8njn0tesi44gjeoov1hqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zep2v2nb0sm1o20h5j7kej6ipaqhupbc5u2gt66g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)
