name: Trump News HQ
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z23u4udsfu19d96mpg2nmle0p8f534f0d4qos7po_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztklve4qfclju0lujgid0g7fvba3n2bfmu38567o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu6miva7p94vjrith2rmo55k05pnt2lum9b7glf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsd04k37idbgapvdd0lop6iuion07k7ht1v0jgdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrhl62kirqab3tc45jsutmld8oi24d5edb6uqc3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhmhn20vhhgjkls4ttkjjdo28mfcgj0biu4s6dkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cth2bs)
---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zvea9mlqd3vu5v24366fdq6qc5nm9v818v6be3go_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjkk38pqe2crrjab3nk85pssps3jd69fmf9grtp0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjmcoj4cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I’m ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that’s why I’m so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I’ll even sign it, Friend.

But here’s the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98219%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7sCvXvDrNYtj4j%2bFuNKF0Q&sysid=1 "Claim your signed copy now
before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

|
FROM MY SENATE DESK

My Christmas wish for
North Carolina's 48th Senatorial District.
| | |
---|---
|

Chuck Edwards, Senator
NC District 48
| |
---
| Merry Christmas!
---
| This holiday season, may you be wrapped in warmth by loved ones and find peace in the blessings given unto our nation by God.
"For unto us a child is born, unto us a son is given; and the government shall be upon his shoulder; and his name shall be called Wonderful, Counsellor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace" Isaiah 9:6 Let us never forget the sacrifice made and gift given through the birth of Jesus Christ, our Redeemer.
From my family to yours, I wish you a very Merry Christmas.
Merry Christmas!
---
|

|

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
Christmas is finally here, and while we all deck the halls and celebrate with our loved ones, I wanted to wish you a Merry Christmas from my family to yours.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0018sm5II4MMVrxFVCjhmvN7QYX6keNB5Idc1KRZAZQdadD_OlDJXlGhUnuiYoGIlfithZY1MDYI0_yaS6-p-Gs9-44UcLFcFjGt-6sZM7SpgGjmV6wY3-tjvMD3jN51yFp2-jfCF57mqrAG8vlElSZbvttgR4aXvTH&c=CEAl9A_eykyY9dnA2BaXJAZknFt13o6QObexG5ZTB7CK3xQk3D1YSw==&ch=lEfJHO_XwJUsiWciZpqEbz7SZRY6C6L0mDOZeAuVp-YVFO9auKZHOA==)

| Friend
Christmas is finally here, and while we all deck the halls and celebrate with our loved ones, I wanted to wish you a Merry Christmas from my family to yours.
Christmas is a time when America can come together to celebrate the joy in our lives and give thanks for all we have. It's a time of friends, food, and family, and I hope you are all able to reflect on the holiday and see those who you hold close.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztluea03tqo345j4t9von3hntnb3bj2c2pacnb80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh9l79301i2o5ha8tptils7slv9044flkrc8tgqo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zms1omg9cbi53unvf2h4s824tcui2s2s9n9bme58_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdd0v6bcg0o1gm8aghsgudvprsdovcsno47pqhjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6737gjfu3arfdnlj060mf6ktbkbq2af5lf7emh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zslhutboki56ftqaukfsqqljodo3c6ske5n4tr28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjjm6o76c5h2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. So before you close out this email, This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America. This special pledge reads: I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters. The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight. You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below: I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional. May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: My Christmas wish for you and yours
body:
| | | Merry Christmas!
---
I hope your day today is filled with love, hope, and joy. I know that for some who have experienced loss near Christmas, today can also be difficult. However, that is the beauty of the real meaning of Christmas. John 1:14 (NIV) says, _“The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us. We have seen his glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth.”_ Whether you are celebrating or grieving (or both) this Christmas, you can rejoice in knowing that God sent his son for you, for me, and for all mankind. The hope born in the manger at Christmas leads us to the hope that we find at the foot of the cross at Easter. This is why Christmastime is traditionally a hopeful time; it is why hope and joy abound during this season. It is that truth that also helps us to focus on family and spending time together with those we love, and not just on the hustle and bustle of the Christmas “to do” list. One of the ways my family enjoys this time together is making what we call, “Baked North Pole.” We’ve been making these desserts every Christmas since my twins were one year old – and they are nineteen now!
---
---
With each passing year, we treasure this tradition more and more, because we understand our time together is truly precious. From the bottom of my heart, and from our entire support team, may your activities and time today also be treasured and remembered! Merry Christmas! Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zruclkff5s84ncj9gooi13e71ft2kci03evsa988_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge0ob4c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zj9j9o57d7fh9928s22kni2vpg073ik8q4d28kqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge0ob4c1h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zug9l9vfe46gv7qg5vjjvg6j834pqsr05v509ka8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge0ob4c1h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd0t8c1pri6tmglenfp5ie3tctu7spda988dvrno_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge0ob4c1h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Susie Lee
subject: Wishing you a Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---

| | Team — I’m wishing you a Merry Christmas from all of us here in the Lee household! Just like so many folks across the district, my kids and I are spending quality time together this Christmas morning. And while there’s nothing like receiving a thoughtful present from your kids, **what makes me happiest is being able to spend quality time with the ones I love** – that is what makes Christmas so special. I’m on breakfast duty this morning so I have to run! From my family to yours – we’re wishing you a safe, healthy, and Merry Christmas. Warmly, Susie Lee

name: American Action News
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1on1158o9guo7i3fpbk0k3e5rfj07unp08evb80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge4oj6cth2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9ni6vu24mfbntsu6n0suq28ncvj3ju3c89nsbg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge4oj6cth2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9f7aqpkpkm8qjv1miu9apd99lhvflbf6uj3nso_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge4oj6cth2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemr5jpd3tj6h8e5sr4vlnr7kid7v8uggl2jhoh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjge4oj6cth2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo
subject: Merry Christmas, Nevada
body:
On behalf of the Lombardo Family and our entire team that’s looking forward to getting the great state of Nevada back on track...
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvL1DaOdG7mXJSQu6yigo09hvz7xvxpj0JSVg23V7gsHG94f3bmhhKF_-1lkPEdM_GAVsLILMYRQvPx8GewqyzpvSlgts3JB3RMzObYR8jJ5OCdR3YOrl4rjOQ07jaM-oy2yGdDSboQIVVCiZE95OHeoQZajKYez&c=XdC_qLskNgX8rIqSZSBkvmRKkHxLnWXPJnQ4Wd1voJTdoAF5rmY_xg==&ch=2a7wFj15KstHQuD6Be48WwoApI5sQ1_hl928aKfouSMRPEJb19wQ1A==)
---
| Peter,
On behalf of the Lombardo Family and our entire team that's looking forward to getting the great state of Nevada back on track...
I hope you have a blessed and Merry Christmas!
May you enjoy this time with loved ones, reflect on all the incredible things that we worked to accomplish this year, and look forward to a future of positivity and prosperity here in the Silver State.
Here's to joy, peace, and good health to you and your family this holiday season.
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dvL1DaOdG7mXJSQu6yigo09hvz7xvxpj0JSVg23V7gsHG94f3bmhhKF_-1lkPEdM_GAVsLILMYRQvPx8GewqyzpvSlgts3JB3RMzObYR8jJ5OCdR3YOrl4rjOQ07jaM-oy2yGdDSboQIVVCiZE95OHeoQZajKYez&c=XdC_qLskNgX8rIqSZSBkvmRKkHxLnWXPJnQ4Wd1voJTdoAF5rmY_xg==&ch=2a7wFj15KstHQuD6Be48WwoApI5sQ1_hl928aKfouSMRPEJb19wQ1A==)
---
| I am so grateful for all that you have done to advance our mission and invest in Nevada's future. Brighter days are yet to come for our state in the New Year, and that's something that each and every one of us should take pride in.
In the meantime, I hope that you enjoy this time with family, and that your Christmas brings with it happiness, many blessings, and a spirit of hope for what lies ahead.
Merry Christmas, Nevada!
-Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo
---
|
---

clean_body: On behalf of the Lombardo Family and our entire team that’s looking forward to getting the great state of Nevada back on track... | | | | == | Peter, On behalf of the Lombardo Family and our entire team that's looking forward to getting the great state of Nevada back on track... I hope you have a blessed and Merry Christmas! May you enjoy this time with loved ones, reflect on all the incredible things that we worked to accomplish this year, and look forward to a future of positivity and prosperity here in the Silver State. Here's to joy, peace, and good health to you and your family this holiday season. | == | I am so grateful for all that you have done to advance our mission and invest in Nevada's future. Brighter days are yet to come for our state in the New Year, and that's something that each and every one of us should take pride in. In the meantime, I hope that you enjoy this time with family, and that your Christmas brings with it happiness, many blessings, and a spirit of hope for what lies ahead. Merry Christmas, Nevada! -Governor-Elect Joe Lombardo | | Lombardo for Governor | == | == == == | | | | | | | Lombardo for Governor | P.O. Box 371176, Las Vegas, NV 89137 | | == Sent by mailto:info@joelombardofornv.com

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=beb1b5dc473148d2be67fc7d053dd101&_e=6HwHU4TjZT2c0Ytjs4jkT3zj0aAYqtybLAE_vyh7_wDeLQsQIJP7_6Vdo8BgB5lWZ5yHBx9KVfuj9sXXVj5mvPrxbh8iDr0xt2_7DmHxlOTb4VWaIsM-xqlpN8hFmstWt747Wl_PFwbSWN1tSMSnw5jHisisBjQJNroDG1N8VRU_ntaXPknh02P6DlikHgRr7v2wuWVxtRtRYj_hMyz2-3-lz_Xtf-54bFtuXZTL7DsUl1IBpFqKulc4RPhecNtHYNYV1Z4HM8tOFeKr_8gusKmC5tsesOTISQXPqOc3hyA5GvnRc3dOtj8sxen1uFtFpy_cMbcJcNsB9c3cuPT5bO3i8y2CCxnu7JTIVNg_JlZy8iRtKsv2P1KF7JGRePtnJecCgezMFZ6FcC1TDvEUhA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=beb1b5dc473148d2be67fc7d053dd101&_e=6HwHU4TjZT2c0Ytjs4jkT3zj0aAYqtybLAE_vyh7_wDeLQsQIJP7_6Vdo8BgB5lWZ5yHBx9KVfuj9sXXVj5mvPrxbh8iDr0xt2_7DmHxlOTb4VWaIsM-xqlpN8hFmstWt747Wl_PFwbSWN1tSMSnw5jHisisBjQJNroDG1N8VRU_ntaXPknh02P6DlikHgRr7v2wuWVxtRtRYj_hMyz2-3-lz_Xtf-54bFtuXZTL7DsUl1IBpFqKulc4RPhecNtH47h-UOuY8XxDbPXLRDpJeTvzPG0Gpy1OcHZDZfgOjo1ou7VJOSF65fbKoJ2jxL4VEMH8mhA3KvPVIeUz8ezWXuhBY-BUrEYGMb2AnIhz1ecSZZzlX-i5gHDigPo0rvLGCTlWdvqZO0aVOQH-ZJBjJQ%3D%3D)
---

I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=beb1b5dc473148d2be67fc7d053dd101&_e=6HwHU4TjZT2c0Ytjs4jkT3zj0aAYqtybLAE_vyh7_wDeLQsQIJP7_6Vdo8BgB5lWZ5yHBx9KVfuj9sXXVj5mvPrxbh8iDr0xt2_7DmHxlOTb4VWaIsM-xqlpN8hFmstWt747Wl_PFwbSWN1tSMSnw5jHisisBjQJNroDG1N8VRU_ntaXPknh02P6DlikHgRr7v2wuWVxtRtRYj_hMyz2-3-lz_Xtf-54bFtuXZTL7DsUl1IBpFqKulc4RPhecNtHfQ6st2yIVh54WZ8FS_NY3UT66C76KAVncTUm0VEew-JwoEia8Gbvbgx0fr4R7XSy7TPsdb4s0GrfWq2W7QjngsyHre8Zwg1I-cqFyfJFj15EpXGVOxn0ojjxqu_QTdSXjjkz4IMe17TowAm_204VXw%3D%3D) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. name: Conservatives Give
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca355322c62a469fbbed4b73a57e9271&_e=QKfZJ45Xe5uFEeVY5jBk19NCYMujvpCnG4usXUuH4I-a30-jO77JwkM_cZ51zZ1BC0VVvlDMdESfsu_2_WKBAdk3kni0l5PpQuN_Oai9AwLnA44272Xg8xpE9-pUB0JDx4DymYzmQijNRBBRRDNQeu6DHF_ertYGoMtHxlbq_oGWsvjUsN2fYeo5uu4WO3ow7YyRu6eOBh31A_0_QIg9YTau8I6KNTwgmGm4u-aYtSd1esmagi33UNNalDyCtMsdu2VTfX5-3um-rSndG2XDAYkqTRdKCMTD6mf0jfDl_ll2kkuPD3ypbv5Z8uP5P5Q3KIRSNc75nocKXTiSFfhPGfpnAayzch3C_NrM7c2-ff14zzpwR0aaVPUAx3NZUpe5)
---
| | Dear Friend,
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca355322c62a469fbbed4b73a57e9271&_e=QKfZJ45Xe5uFEeVY5jBk19NCYMujvpCnG4usXUuH4I-a30-jO77JwkM_cZ51zZ1BC0VVvlDMdESfsu_2_WKBAdk3kni0l5PpQuN_Oai9AwLnA44272Xg8xpE9-pUB0JDx4DymYzmQijNRBBRRDNQeu6DHF_ertYGoMtHxlbq_oGWsvjUsN2fYeo5uu4WO3ow7YyRu6eOBh31A_0_QIg9YTau8I6KNTwgmGm4u-aYtSfnprImvXTfxyexq03GJIUIVrVm9bXKprhhctKg8IoZwuAKMuiW-RtnEiZ2UvxOX3OYl6rbgnHNun0EiyVrmN0BCzcE2Jvfqo_FMRAkKPiUcy4GXFlsYCv1IrCmBaLuVKnJaM5ObBTko-sEnb6fHkbx)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca355322c62a469fbbed4b73a57e9271&_e=QKfZJ45Xe5uFEeVY5jBk19NCYMujvpCnG4usXUuH4I-a30-jO77JwkM_cZ51zZ1BC0VVvlDMdESfsu_2_WKBAdk3kni0l5PpQuN_Oai9AwLnA44272Xg8xpE9-pUB0JDx4DymYzmQijNRBBRRDNQeu6DHF_ertYGoMtHxlbq_oGWsvjUsN2fYeo5uu4WO3ow7YyRu6eOBh31A_0_QIg9YTau8I6KNTwgmGm4u-aYtScvqEH2lXYUU31ia4RW27cmoKeOWVy9Uvq626SxLBtVVmhEYpvjZ6euBib9opLinYt81TEBcZAqcZEfagLHrTWj5DvChvfG1-FQsyco8DVqfSsLNJ_ItExned9UeWhZQ9qot79f2itguEBr2c-i_Kr_)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ca355322c62a469fbbed4b73a57e9271&_e=QKfZJ45Xe5uFEeVY5jBk19NCYMujvpCnG4usXUuH4I-a30-jO77JwkM_cZ51zZ1BC0VVvlDMdESfsu_2_WKBAdk3kni0l5PpQuN_Oai9AwLnA44272Xg8xpE9-pUB0JDx4DymYzmQijNRBBRRDNQeu6DHF_ertYGoMtHxlbq_oGWsvjUsN2fYeo5uu4WO3ow7YyRu6eOBh31A_0_QIg9YTau8I6KNTwgmGm4u-aYtSfOuQ65kfep3I22hVqAuq63V2B7FBikxcrBZ1dlcXJDORZtWnO-ZpHBiqt-xQUJFvxTLSehHXizxuzwK44s-dQToYYp3JKhRVRKRs-KWUbUD8bPvAIYy4oEPpw1OewTrjtFNe46nXVrAxuK3y7FctpX)**

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ5Gan27ZxMyK6gcGRM81Xs9yHzP7nPjCndGF0PLfp98q6B3bvhW6Ass1bKiv7MdeWuJIqOeegRScu0Phs8ErFc14oa3yAGvT3b60hGdgfaa7oKxL8Iv3PVb4XGskPdf3s8qSNG8706_Rfl4-mHmgonE)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ4enmEnEj9ZijCxZtWqvGLXehfro5uhm3pD9WIFFNBVuM5MTCELQ3nPfF3FUwz2zri3ozaY5ngb0_PmnVgF6Ved33tR2K8L8iaRnGYPnw-srcxhMiVvkBVQniRFIFpVkm_OzBXZiVWGbTdwNz1YOpQh) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ5JMEzvmRTB_wq2xc3Z0fz8y1HpUjusf9RQoV62-lqbOKYaDgWafZ9omwIUwgBdtmmR6UAmfz29n04dP9dmyO4Uk6ubQwCGlTQ0dj6mBudGOgFlWJVTn6gP-ae-Xv1M4Ns96qzLO429yJ2zcyUPxOs6)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ5au7NYGU5jQ6PwfTZIdr3c_FC50R_bFabz6iC4d_HMLL-PWvznsduOWcEWmyhEhPbyIKfbpBPbxY4NQZmlu70jqYt77H5JUboYGjBam_8e_qG7ByQHE_BuaJXj8G3dC9xaC6a49Cj0FtqjvXmvmyV7)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ5-ibXtHVd1oYaihqEUmB0BV-jvdVQi9T9R10c72j0WunhSXk0XP9f19tfGwhAYcsOv_EYcbda73Uf_Z1-xpgJ2lAsLwEMKlZNZ9AlINUrY8oPGtr2yyctShTbdyYRvhOi9DQK2JGEgab6-psHELcGJ)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8054d46d3ec546edb47cf2abb6914cf1&_e=PuV_DPecWqkd2XSmW5zpBT-rQ63BplN6QpTNuScx8psxz7ZSmd1OO29xG7LhGUr4FV_hVeW76HENMQEcIWaAc7pHraNqS0U1PCVweuAjMDuczRVIbXTubb3dCWz7zcq_Wb_ah6ceOZDdo_R03UgL6lnp1RlmPQdX9nf1I1OO650ttpwUmwCdb5V9q4ilW0tTYysnaV0aPjVTrBDny1ZzUIsyNQB24BFlrKNIZvwNDZ6KjWpkSc9fltiQ2sCBREtpjgbGbSgJcg1Psn8PCIIgm6nw43uYUUcv2SdEuVomMFqrI0o95_mTdV4XbvsFJA4R5SOZNkNNUcxGwyel0pFn-2RtAXnoA_lJ4MD310IPl_3vdnPEpMx0E40t91wDjTZ1)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Kristi Noem
subject: I signed a copy of my new memoir for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Claim yours ASAP before I run out

|
---
| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

name: Great America Update
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7511%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=G38yP%2f9WQp1YabqKqs%2f2Sw&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77424%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HrTARxcdl8t3WTNya3oiFw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77435%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2beRsRNFUrMa4VOVFgLt8LA&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77436%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YAGf7raayJh7MYaxrYcVTQ&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77437%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HcWftWruhI7vwlKcZgixbw&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c77438%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W9dQMy7QrYLI4fi3Nlp5DA&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: Claim yours ASAP before I run out | | | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem! As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words. And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir Not My First Rodeo. Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend. But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy. "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!" | "Kristi Noem book image" Not My First Rodeoby Kristi Noem | | | "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY" From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today. "But I can’t sign one for everybody! name: Your America
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7679%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=1RAIXndW4d6RXLe3LtIL1A&sysid=1)
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98367%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ef1ZH6pKWnSKCdQzu8ZAKQ&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98368%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cZGvk%2bToZQDzCQNRyU9sdQ&sysid=1)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98369%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IXooFTzOt3K0SLwW0bWbOg&sysid=1) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98360%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cRdknCu9CwWTjg7xn1q%2fWQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c98361%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1lWe7CRPSXXr%2bpVjGYGblQ&sysid=1)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

**Patriot, what 's being done to them is so demonic, so foul, that they're BEGGING to be transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba...where vicious, America-hating terrorists get better treatment!**

I'm heartsick and deeply angry about what's being done to our fellow patriots.

Their letter reads like an appeal from dissidents in the Soviet Union.

Here are just a few examples of what they're enduring (I quote directly from their letter, published by Gateway Pundit):

* Begging for Help / Water / Medical Aid / Mercy through a 4-inch by 10-inch window of cold metal doors
* No visits from family, friends, lawyers, or clergy
* No Mass or Sunday worship service
* Laundry returning with brown stains, pubic hair, and or reeking of ripe urine
* Broken toilets that either wont flush or repeatedly explode in Cells
* Stuck in Cells for 9 days without a shower
* Solitary Confinement for 25 1⁄2 hours or more at a time

Outrageously, there's more.

**Guards deny them hot water and keep them from attending court. They severely beat, mace, harass, insult, and even sexually assault them.**

Their food is so disgusting and so low in nutrition, that some prisoners are losing their eyesight, their hair, and getting scurvy (from Vitamin C deficiency).

There's much, much more...all of it horrifying.

And this has been going on for up to a year and a half...in AMERICA.

This can't go on. I won't allow it.

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

Not to mention that I also enjoined Obama's corrupt NSA from mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of Americans and killed Obama's illegal amnesty for over 5 million illegal aliens, a case that went all the way to the Supreme Court!

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten regime in court.

**Nobody else is doing what I 'm doing in court to get justice for these poor people.**

Larry Klayman

**Free the January 6 Protestors!
**
Right now, un-American politicians and corrupt members of the Department of Justice are keeping innocent Americans in jail without due process...they're often abused and beaten...they're blocked from seeing their wives and children...and kept from seeing their lawyers and clergy!

At least one January 6 protestor has already died.

And another protester, a patriot grandma with cancer, just finished serving 60 days in federal prison for a crime she didn't commit.

Peter,

From my family to yours, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas. As we celebrate today with friends and family, we are reminded of all our blessings.
---
---
I’d like to thank you again for all of your support, prayers, and words of encouragement in 2022. I appreciate it more than words can express – and I look forward to working with you in 2023 to get our great country back on the right track. Merry Christmas! -Kevin Hern

body:
Claim yours ASAP before I run out

| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=34e70f720de24215947b1e2ed89cafcf&_e=6yiOvH5tSFLx59_i4pT1_efH3sfB9RLn7RDTyeojp8l8kyU9BcuuzO4fODzS02II1ADAyQlUx4iCgQvdsI0jLCGRr6zNY-8u3RcCM3ZxMAQ74vZx33hvYYiQ2FCWFyrMLch4_yi-q1QgjpJtkTPFZTl6KlT8NnqDaqkzipF1h0eaKUCVRygqOayNrbL27n1pVJZYLfACbIobBWhvNkhUjaMWsiWBlBgux5uvIIAJRVizOPnB9YXG0LEufhV9dheYeiyU5ILLroDs_tJlogSLIE64Ev8oxmInLxttz1ztXvrDJiUkGWPTWKl64S-RnKmCSXaeQNpPR1sSProBXAY5NdNT9IKbOxmnONBXzDEQeYhT7P2veT8TxN9tRTLkqGEzdcRGh3_TnxuTvk4llTm3umEdGCnvFeBtdPx3OizVqfXne1Yv-6aa1YQLrGmp4zp8 "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

Governor Kristi Noem

subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
I am beyond grateful and ready to represent you in the Senate.

|
---

**THE ONLY OFFICIAL EMAILS FROM TED BUDD**

Dear Peter,

**MERRY CHRISTMAS**
It is with great joy and appreciation that I write to you this Christmas Day. As I prepare to work in the U.S. Senate next year, I am humbled by the support and encouragement I have received from so many of you. **_You are the reason we won the North Carolina Senate race, and you are the reason I am eager to get started._**

As we celebrate Christmas today, I am reminded of the importance of serving others during our limited time on this earth. Our nation faces many challenges in the year ahead, no doubt there will be new ones we can’t anticipate. My guiding commitment remains to my grandfather’s family motto, “Just do what you said you’re going to do.”

With God’s help, I will work hard to protect your family, make our communities safer, hold our government accountable, empower hard-working Americans, and protect your freedom.

**I am thankful for the opportunity to serve you.** I look forward to working to advance policies that will make our nation stronger, more prosperous, and more free.

**_On this Christmas Day, may your hearts be filled with joy from knowing God’s peace._**

**_“The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us. We have seen his glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth.” John 1:14_**
Wishing you a Merry Christmas and a happy and healthy 2023!

God Bless,

Ted Budd, Senator-elect

| |

Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader in North Carolina.
| Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
---

subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c20cc94a837848d99e5bb11e9f583cd3&_e=AlO218eLjA7iAD9yjIUlfTm6JkKebc4ggj6Uu2mTOiqgg-8AhDOHKdZmH3r8d1nW6Frt0t9AtV8ZnFMXCXB6lckLVF_-gBBj_I9mgDx8FUV445k1xrkEF-V5jOqDmDnIxCFbpEXaKHwr55Tp-VE7KgN518qTDWc_w4rDKkXTGeN_o_4utY-lSIRAt1n_wutNxEsf5izoreZplBiOkTLr4aIETziUMUr-WU0NNHogIiSXp3skC3V0kJmFgN8S9tO4jO3eKjJAvoP-dfpGLS4NdSfUVRPFqzQ_6Kwryyhn90MItx6Y5ODeZyPnxgdyH81oQOB43EEEfGy5zE_08K7lrRy0kpKogLwu_gV-W4nFuK3cvL4iVYTJgRIqLHfoVx5r)

Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c20cc94a837848d99e5bb11e9f583cd3&_e=AlO218eLjA7iAD9yjIUlfTm6JkKebc4ggj6Uu2mTOiqgg-8AhDOHKdZmH3r8d1nW6Frt0t9AtV8ZnFMXCXB6lckLVF_-gBBj_I9mgDx8FUV445k1xrkEF-V5jOqDmDnIxCFbpEXaKHwr55Tp-VE7KgN518qTDWc_w4rDKkXTGeN_o_4utY-lSIRAt1n_wutNxEsf5izoreZplBiOkTLr4aIETziUMUr-WU0NNHogIiTA42WpOgfSXL3WqMNlyjUOU6AFP1DyKvqtM-R90etR5NjT0hOV0py9pe2AkTN_JQJp_F3kZYUpU97xjLQZbPVawxjc_wB4Ae7AU59scao2fCZFvQxECVFwlUX9tU_89ODaTfJcyrjETk8X2HlXWXP_)

body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62f3d446e4d042ac8437b3f60012ece7&_e=vHvuk7uUNczdqNPpClUlYPrA0KTiMdeMhswpxPbLkpd5PxQMaKatmUNDqZjLqxlNPudfh_jumpR1TeJcnAGNHcyIw2c0ZS1E4QSjE70J89Jb0Ef6_teJD4oE5rMZgYtoiJwRN1Qt7vqc6JM8J11SuQkDPTOeGfnoI5s_lGbocBjnwe-fX2-FpsDZwsu26_1Iq_HuxR_FBumyytktr4CYq0D2yN5ZOdbeDBR9yWu7B1hEt7BLbWFSbc63ke9NZZD8pouIxQtQrcwpfCrV8YqVosLzcIUL3Pi_LuM3aIMJmUGuqBEZIJqZl9EX-UIBinbpYrtoc57ygvyLlSL7mCBtzMJMVnEq8czvUSM275HTwsEE07I3TLQLVzOH-6tkuYfRJ9D9uNhIKqWgnd8onWWG_t2C6TBLAb3TKkI3xt1a5_51zF-6wEgOus-UypFAL07v)

| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62f3d446e4d042ac8437b3f60012ece7&_e=vHvuk7uUNczdqNPpClUlYPrA0KTiMdeMhswpxPbLkpd5PxQMaKatmUNDqZjLqxlNPudfh_jumpR1TeJcnAGNHcyIw2c0ZS1E4QSjE70J89Jb0Ef6_teJD4oE5rMZgYtoiJwRN1Qt7vqc6JM8J11SuQkDPTOeGfnoI5s_lGbocBjnwe-fX2-FpsDZwsu26_1Iq_HuxR_FBumyytktr4CYq0D2yN5ZOdbeDBR9yWu7B1hEt7BLbWFSbc63ke9NZZD8pouIxQtQrcwpfCrV8YqVolM5kZG2Bh9_dxkHQdMwRhPSrJVXe_l3nT0NRwr7ZY_TzsgTipBYjA-qrG_sLOdB7wPap37RK8udvRE-lIGIkXBqrwcRCfRqdvd7HINH3ZTaQ0uZgqxW6dsCuqcU46f9tHyRfm3Srg5VPLZxbIOsUZc8QaKo8vS8dj2cW-66ukNF)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62f3d446e4d042ac8437b3f60012ece7&_e=vHvuk7uUNczdqNPpClUlYPrA0KTiMdeMhswpxPbLkpd5PxQMaKatmUNDqZjLqxlNPudfh_jumpR1TeJcnAGNHcyIw2c0ZS1E4QSjE70J89Jb0Ef6_teJD4oE5rMZgYtoiJwRN1Qt7vqc6JM8J11SuQkDPTOeGfnoI5s_lGbocBjnwe-fX2-FpsDZwsu26_1Iq_HuxR_FBumyytktr4CYq0D2yN5ZOdbeDBR9yWu7B1hEt7BLbWFSbc63ke9NZZD8pouIxQtQrcwpfCrV8YqVon9wsx2jD1iLux2iA9-xo5-C3k0_QSOxANkfVO7xvdfFevK-g7stRcBWj-xjXjrRLrJ38SxhuHXMc67ftgPj3k-Jqx5lhexRf2SKqQ-5yU2eLys1V8CPpUVMsNQEQKTy6wLvdqtWRtuZFcJe6xXKgXr7Xl5WnJe6BJvZiR_Nz0xY)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=62f3d446e4d042ac8437b3f60012ece7&_e=vHvuk7uUNczdqNPpClUlYPrA0KTiMdeMhswpxPbLkpd5PxQMaKatmUNDqZjLqxlNPudfh_jumpR1TeJcnAGNHcyIw2c0ZS1E4QSjE70J89Jb0Ef6_teJD4oE5rMZgYtoiJwRN1Qt7vqc6JM8J11SuQkDPTOeGfnoI5s_lGbocBjnwe-fX2-FpsDZwsu26_1Iq_HuxR_FBumyytktr4CYq0D2yN5ZOdbeDBR9yWu7B1hEt7BLbWFSbc63ke9NZZD8pouIxQtQrcwpfCrV8YqVokVXdd8SYvo3aoIqv1ooJ22UzDWdmoAe5IjGUwWUsehgdLXFelZokCX5NAwKzcXkiwvPH_j2QIplzWsSSc0pds84vVF1eoLGmNw4Yp7Vm_icdWLmp1u4lFR3pD_G6VNSVFyJq_9Pq8y4QyfcHtiYN_lB7A0IxYAlLMz2zhdqJtBK).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

| Peter,
Merry Christmas! I hope you enjoy this holiday season in the company of friends, family, and loved ones celebrating the miracle of this day.
---
|
---
| My wife Ginger and I wish peace, happiness, and many blessings for you and yours this Christmas - may you find it to truly be the most wonderful time of the year.
God Bless You, God Bless Florida, and God Bless America!

Merry Christmas,
---
|
---
| Matt Gaetz Representative, Florida's 1st Congressional District
---

name: Rick Scott
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
From the bottom of my heart, I want to wish you a very Merry Christmas.

Today, I’m so grateful to celebrate in the greatest country on Earth.

I know that God is watching over America and all of its great patriots like you.

I hope you’re having a wonderful holiday with friends and family.

Merry Christmas and God Bless America!
---
| | Thank You, Rick Scott
---
| | |

name: Caroline Colarusso for Congress
subject: Merry Christmas
body:
To Us a Savior Has Been Born
| | | |
---
---

# HAVE A BLESSED CHRISTMAS

---
| |
### Dear Friends,

There's so much to love about Christmas. It is the miraculous story of Jesus' birth, the true hope for all mankind. As you and your family spend cherished time together let us remember that Jesus is the reason for the Season. Today we celebrate Emmanuel, God is with Us. Forever.

Yours in faith, Caroline Colarusso
---
| Wishing You a Very Merry Christmas!
---
---
---
| | | | | | | Caroline Colarusso for Congress | 4 Patrick Circle, Stoneham, MA 02180

subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7de475c292874fe7b95fbbb03e6fca96&_e=j_Yibm85iCoaGSLmd55yVmJnrOjognpehyG9Oxx5FekOF9dSgmz62AYmqh-J7X04plEDFZ1Ur1O53RYbuzA9MISRMw37U6emw_KN_M2ZcnfcMZimYEVkYiBajA5KjtvZqGacweBbCOBnHikLi9oMd3DgH_lqy_yR589Ye3wGFmgCZG1nsXQtzBBr8GJqdqrjtM4HY9lK3msyHefphaPlAWwyHlWclFnPf7V1SFMdLLhlVOM2tq6xSVXjajvMOpVEa1VomFsozOiRaOozea557zcPkJoWj7StE8PT4TXZpTjeqQoiN2enu5Eh84EUcGmX6BKnQZcDe_waeSfDaXSp-CU1ZdxAUqVr1I9RWL74rwwuo04EiTf_yxjV7_VpGnzEH9A_wq7wcBZTgPuDAvJmcw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7de475c292874fe7b95fbbb03e6fca96&_e=j_Yibm85iCoaGSLmd55yVmJnrOjognpehyG9Oxx5FekOF9dSgmz62AYmqh-J7X04plEDFZ1Ur1O53RYbuzA9MISRMw37U6emw_KN_M2ZcnfcMZimYEVkYiBajA5KjtvZqGacweBbCOBnHikLi9oMd3DgH_lqy_yR589Ye3wGFmgCZG1nsXQtzBBr8GJqdqrjtM4HY9lK3msyHefphaPlAWwyHlWclFnPf7V1SFMdLLhlVOM2tq6xSVXjajvMOpVE2y2DmO292b6apl0pBtgttbbc0xu0r96Q9URimqK1sL57BMaDni2daJ_GW5dFJcc9adijfJWHP8VC7HsO3gN9_bNVGXEWRUQz4Etn2UC7D-UyvfyXlk-S-C5inq6o7udAiTAp9vwSaLYBurjMIflaOw%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7de475c292874fe7b95fbbb03e6fca96&_e=j_Yibm85iCoaGSLmd55yVmJnrOjognpehyG9Oxx5FekOF9dSgmz62AYmqh-J7X04plEDFZ1Ur1O53RYbuzA9MISRMw37U6emw_KN_M2ZcnfcMZimYEVkYiBajA5KjtvZqGacweBbCOBnHikLi9oMd3DgH_lqy_yR589Ye3wGFmgCZG1nsXQtzBBr8GJqdqrjtM4HY9lK3msyHefphaPlAWwyHlWclFnPf7V1SFMdLLhlVOM2tq6xSVXjajvMOpVEnesPBRLvZEBEMzQlcgw4hF6xkCIej5WU5aw5Rw3DPDx8CWS8QW5xQBdN0_bTWUkrpLSUMajwhNOMflCKMzmN4SHLbQCtOYyMzIghxtwo73KTeExGZjgR7RHq1r2kscvgaY18Vp514W3lEPgKYLXNsw%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of " The Second World Wars" on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Restoring hope in our country
body:

But we must not lose hope. Instead, we must fight back with the truth. Hillsdale College has been engaging the Left on the battlefield of education from the beginning. That’s why we’ve turned our course, [**“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=31e6c9addefb4b288f2a07ee31a9612a&_e=V2NcQ0wZNtkmS79MjVHuT8ndkzCEAHO-Y2LFdlonlPdcpgeOOjGqc2ToRrAPArSQ50bLwicCgYbI4u6Xs8Qm13hrTWJnGr3DjenhoYWTZJEuhK8r4S1s1UHmUGaHepu2DpOzQnMf412TmqQCGCQhQETj1pc-KJnM0fVRVxzMeG4WnmZYdp1sqT3jlpAB5QEkjOVldoeGqHhj3Bq7kL2NGxnfMP-pXcoeQ8iLDFJAvtDsbOAlreRYpTarqGZQXhs9Ka0E_UXa_MK-bTeufNzXCydnpbFNEFDKruyLZUAe7qcg-RBF0LhUaJceOnJGyjzAtnB6xkeC-XYR2Ydi5BH3JVHR1ZAchz95_MaLGPdsCT3oxMN4p8apOpJ7Ptp34Z63NOP0NsgiGczmTpoWNejR8A%3D%3D) into a DVD set, and I’d like you to have a copy. Hillsdale’s goal in producing this course is to **restore the kind of intelligent patriotism—especially among our young people—that is essential to preserving free government.** **“The Great American Story: A Land of Hope”** is a powerful counterweight to _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project,” which is injecting the idea that America is an essentially unjust nation into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. name: 1600 Daily
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqeg6v42uojao3nnkvfb3q6jvfj1p3fs6hb39djo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie2o74cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsirkur28rabhnk8ue6ilvfskuf02vncfel3c508_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie2o74cth2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zepcrhtic3q25c2dorn3m37a5kln6rqc25dap9v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie2o74cth2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zldmgbme6sbtat7k067nftd36i3cuh7hhpe06568_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie2o74cth2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdjcj52ob87n9uc5onid16hrg9rhjf0in5d20mq0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie2o74cth2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adb52ec7947a40a7a825faec582ea2b3&_e=HfmuE5Dd97wrg5FBrJ178w3SVvaCkjjimJvPUd7Ttkg1k2N5g8xEEV4XOwOPaXY8wj-U0naOI36OKaS6l0cIsRISxHC0c0zTz6o78Pjk8KSbxL6HJOA_pblUeu0WF_4jabb7xfjF1e8MkHioiBKZ4epPqHU41u3kfLWAJU8e2GL0I4udYNw7bwq5kiDmbpydNO696y3xYaq4eymfuX-K7kPYuSOJ0bLri8_jpjKGlLSgarvtL4Eko3Tn-B4brxpWPr6cjIXHSo9uw1X3_0kkV3m7_Sreegd9TwNxNJN_5V5ZkoWGWSZqHC1-dTHa8t5JosRfPoT4N3376e2zpMekCgqncYkTxW5g0QSYY6kMNEqpQWElrBlxbw2SWOjW3pJxm53ctR8YdPPagsf7E-ERdMA0G0tUr_l8m1myNYPXBiWgL2DyG1nLb0ap1QtmlFAP)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adb52ec7947a40a7a825faec582ea2b3&_e=HfmuE5Dd97wrg5FBrJ178w3SVvaCkjjimJvPUd7Ttkg1k2N5g8xEEV4XOwOPaXY8wj-U0naOI36OKaS6l0cIsRISxHC0c0zTz6o78Pjk8KSbxL6HJOA_pblUeu0WF_4jabb7xfjF1e8MkHioiBKZ4epPqHU41u3kfLWAJU8e2GL0I4udYNw7bwq5kiDmbpydNO696y3xYaq4eymfuX-K7kPYuSOJ0bLri8_jpjKGlLSgarvtL4Eko3Tn-B4brxpWPr6cjIXHSo9uw1X3_0kkV3nRq7eJ54K_08ClxXHyurakVoTIHKJGKoQUBbEfPcNxZYPenjqIYj__FpqRQt9W-l0_pqC4CPVfJGJ0r6ad69u_IilK54OUo_KZq2CIfHkAPcOLGrbwc2jVnnv0A6hmn5gDdBWTRJI2UgNURkHjMPrGnu2smGcc9MRIx77JblaZ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adb52ec7947a40a7a825faec582ea2b3&_e=HfmuE5Dd97wrg5FBrJ178w3SVvaCkjjimJvPUd7Ttkg1k2N5g8xEEV4XOwOPaXY8wj-U0naOI36OKaS6l0cIsRISxHC0c0zTz6o78Pjk8KSbxL6HJOA_pblUeu0WF_4jabb7xfjF1e8MkHioiBKZ4epPqHU41u3kfLWAJU8e2GL0I4udYNw7bwq5kiDmbpydNO696y3xYaq4eymfuX-K7kPYuSOJ0bLri8_jpjKGlLSgarvtL4Eko3Tn-B4brxpWPr6cjIXHSo9uw1X3_0kkV2Hp0Qad52Ohs8BMijyPmdT1o-Hjf3eOSX8yF-QpYi5thnjONnviyciUpgvEU3QVW73NANZKNatoBjCuDV3d2rUPlOrBVgZKRr0z6fh0-BHT7t93L_UnFb8PXJidqaCIKi28iQ3eCMUI7ZN7dDhTH9spq5YukF0A6eLrqS80i0eH)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=adb52ec7947a40a7a825faec582ea2b3&_e=HfmuE5Dd97wrg5FBrJ178w3SVvaCkjjimJvPUd7Ttkg1k2N5g8xEEV4XOwOPaXY8wj-U0naOI36OKaS6l0cIsRISxHC0c0zTz6o78Pjk8KSbxL6HJOA_pblUeu0WF_4jabb7xfjF1e8MkHioiBKZ4epPqHU41u3kfLWAJU8e2GL0I4udYNw7bwq5kiDmbpydNO696y3xYaq4eymfuX-K7kPYuSOJ0bLri8_jpjKGlLSgarvtL4Eko3Tn-B4brxpWPr6cjIXHSo9uw1X3_0kkVwEp0TW1Zq8T0DWSD5U-RU8xa5oHWgUAPfIjUH-oWtH-E8JpEKYn242xw3gfeZZr2_8ZYZe3aS3Cz-vg5bn4pfHS-DemzoWUxlGiNb_kkFML82UWv6b4sBcWVn7a35FbS9sfQWtoHMtrz17QCYyNYRrAzsgmTjy5zC8fECyiK1Z_).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: From my family to yours, Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, I want to take a moment today to wish you a Merry Christmas.

Today is one of the most joyous days of the year, and I hope you are celebrating with loved one.

I am so grateful to get to spend today in the greatest country on Earth and the best state in America.

God bless America and Merry Christmas!

---
In Service,

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want to take a moment today to wish you a Merry Christmas. Today is one of the most joyous days of the year, and I hope you are celebrating with loved one. I am so grateful to get to spend today in the greatest country on Earth and the best state in America. God bless America and Merry Christmas! In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (FL-6) | | | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Michael Waltz for Congress

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fe2709010cb4966b7e1d21be4ff9dd2&_e=M08ylba7ka61zclX5wccus5mvhDmjBP_utC1p84-9TIKuaMD_v67lfKsSszEboDg4d9tDwOWlJUOwtDjhnJBECMzWsZuPgGtQxAamcBRjgKbsVdiRmqUZSkuraO-9OswspOi1jfRCwrNN6kWArTg9wK4C7CORimigCC1PlUqkvITfs0-GAhIhKY-UZuQ97ZjhwtHUme94K7Dnb1PSiM19c2dBX67YzbNFrJ5ybB7X9MzOQtaOVbB1TOkflXMK7Me86VzIwAntXtjV9SlArzPBjsEqFQ7RDT_ek9JriSSEKDVPZ-XU1_VSPmsaU5Bedn_oZ-05djXwTh00dwf7BGqBUcn-hzi9VQX9Wude1-fblxzyj9WjrH9OjI9ljDPOn5j)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* >From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fe2709010cb4966b7e1d21be4ff9dd2&_e=M08ylba7ka61zclX5wccus5mvhDmjBP_utC1p84-9TIKuaMD_v67lfKsSszEboDg4d9tDwOWlJUOwtDjhnJBECMzWsZuPgGtQxAamcBRjgKbsVdiRmqUZSkuraO-9OswspOi1jfRCwrNN6kWArTg9wK4C7CORimigCC1PlUqkvITfs0-GAhIhKY-UZuQ97ZjhwtHUme94K7Dnb1PSiM19c2dBX67YzbNFrJ5ybB7X9Nxaa2d7J2OzNZyp3tPqD9GQrTtV8Wso0XLv69OVFSpjZHfsoIMiR2go_3x9LxcKKIRj4iGeqBi-5itC_8pqXiEpwse2niO7Ga93UGj8VUEW9nyzbSJHn7kBJWGMEVz9S745f_BJW7wKABcyi2Sz6-c)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fe2709010cb4966b7e1d21be4ff9dd2&_e=M08ylba7ka61zclX5wccus5mvhDmjBP_utC1p84-9TIKuaMD_v67lfKsSszEboDg4d9tDwOWlJUOwtDjhnJBECMzWsZuPgGtQxAamcBRjgKbsVdiRmqUZSkuraO-9OswspOi1jfRCwrNN6kWArTg9wK4C7CORimigCC1PlUqkvITfs0-GAhIhKY-UZuQ97ZjhwtHUme94K7Dnb1PSiM19c2dBX67YzbNFrJ5ybB7X9OvR8jIJxahdpa6814Nbp6wP7096krY92MDmATN3h7rNssdUlWIQHs5tczr6e7eyrbcyX_nFi36kBurYPwMTEV_rznKoxSZ4KkeC4dPYEfD5bJTLYeniCijG2VGBWij6CaGfiRIkk6usfJiY5SpD9Nm)

| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9fe2709010cb4966b7e1d21be4ff9dd2&_e=M08ylba7ka61zclX5wccus5mvhDmjBP_utC1p84-9TIKuaMD_v67lfKsSszEboDg4d9tDwOWlJUOwtDjhnJBECMzWsZuPgGtQxAamcBRjgKbsVdiRmqUZSkuraO-9OswspOi1jfRCwrNN6kWArTg9wK4C7CORimigCC1PlUqkvITfs0-GAhIhKY-UZuQ97ZjhwtHUme94K7Dnb1PSiM19c2dBX67YzbNFrJ5ybB7X9Pi2K0eS-rCIhB2AvBcNv97RmzK5tdJdM8OgWhf5YcC26GFup95WYDdPMlxThOLiANj7ySVusCOu7nmpV7dfg2sc4IQHtIPk7g-W6V_0qMLtSyGxXfGLrzwEDzn_W0ejK3XPt99It6TSwwlY7Un_f5k) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Indiana Democratic Party
subject: Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, We’re reaching out today to say Happy Holidays from the team at the Indiana Democratic Party! We hope that this season is full of rest, relaxation, and time spent with families and loved ones. Thank you for your continued support of our efforts to elect Democratic leaders who have our best interests at heart. **Our work wouldn’t be possible without the time, energy and resources that you put into this mission.** We are steadfast in our resolve to elect more Democrats in 2023 and make sure that the Hoosier State is a place where every person and family can thrive. And while there is more work to do in the weeks and months ahead, today we hope that you are able to take some time to spend with the people you care about most. Thank you, and Happy Holidays! Indiana Dems

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a5f84f14f3c44310a3c031e3f9088822&_e=zXUzxLllb2SlVVLuC4Ftsey3VBGdAADEm_UVR5l9Uhx7reSfV45DOFsslpUnQepEmDPykJw0FbsmmfOdHJgwvb-NoSHecvKSXSKxgYSGtlM04Gi0K73XWWx6B900RlsZoz5N-2K4FmfLJwd2FvBbjTWtpkOpjHIfwA6UcTQm4IOmYS7fVqFoH1BOtcMQ2Pyq1qBsw0afJRsqKWRyGyztYQ9VcQlgqiI0FIaR-929D9HhC7r184ZU4a-hUg6fk93qkjSD4vuPVSXHutXf03X58fCrWJcd3IwRYno0xFddektunjil9XqdYeI7iJYPdfegr6McO-7HQW5TQJJ4fW2BzoZq3DwyHpCRbq8bvjpT5z_rW3-wIVm8xOs8IT0X8uATQH_1_o0e05yOB_7mF1WzZw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---

body:

|
