| | | Hi Friend, its South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem!

As an unapologetic Conservative, the Fake News media has said a lot about me these last few years, but now I'm ready to set the record straight and tell my story in my own words.

**And that 's why I'm so excited to offer you an exclusive copy of my new memoir _Not My First Rodeo_.** Plus, if you claim your copy today, I'll even sign it, Friend.

But here's the thing -- I am only offering this exclusive opportunity to a very limited number of conservative supporters. So this might be your only chance to claim your very owned signed copy.

_**[Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5832dghnkccrj29le8708gi5uqh6grhigr41q80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs "Claim your signed copy now before I have to offer this to another top Conservative supporter!")**_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpjpbotb1b3aveuv00apgbgj3l1p6uoees82s77g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6vvist385rnds1bcjhv2bloob42v10a368htct0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zauia3lvsmo0uki56305htqk2q509b1nmnibmkeg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zct6koa2g7d8o9b1nk24igl9chv21kugr6vtbfr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8vpfjrai5aldjj99c87ipu8ig53b8a0hl7504mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z65p8saprs2p98lonon9v80sp5kr58r88d1h51u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4cjie1ob2chh2bs)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Mississippi GOP
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party
body:
The holiday season is upon us and we want to wish you a very Merry Christmas!
As we reflect on this past year, we must extend one final thank you to our
incredible supporters.

Because of patriots like you, we have kept the Mississippi GOP fighting and
the American spirit alive. Mississippi remains great because of you and your
families.

We want to thank you for your incredible ongoing support and dedication to our
state. Take this time to celebrate with your loved ones and enjoy the holiday
season.

Wishing you and your family a Merry Christmas!

Thank you,

Mississippi GOP

Paid for by the Mississippi Republican Party

name: Tate Reeves
subject: Wishing you a Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Friend, It’s the most wonderful time of year and I want to wish you and your family a Merry Christmas. We have so much to be grateful for this holiday season and great things to look forward to in 2023.

This year, I’m incredibly grateful for you and every Mississippian who makes our home state of Mississippi so great. It’s folks like you who make our state one to be so proud of, and I want you to know how much I appreciate you. Take today to celebrate with your loved ones and enjoy the holiday season.

Thank you and Merry Christmas,

Tate Reeves

Thank you and Merry Christmas, Tate Reeves | | | | Paid for by Tate for Governor | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Tate for Governor P.O. Box 24355, Jackson, MS 39225

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_AmVBrqYlybD6zwInqfy2bgxTEDMt573kA5vXz5hFWC2sV_Os7VaeGFMF9ucBcAFIsqmdd8TKEJR-UsDPQ86LncCFWVkz_UFm8r5Pp9RIIuHJtWdpmrRSKpL81YFVAMwPOU07ceWv-cSYiClv2Vn-PE%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_OgusnQq_dsu0vIYYJYcHbVC7wzGxwJWG27ePgcwYNTF0LDZ43eDIzdj1a37dWQzZ2drq0nuoLrtGxREcqLy-_plTreIWNL3foM07HJYt5FGg828SMNhZOsm9Ftxz_dVCjes5t8KqLPqlt3WiBa12g4%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_PFEmHmRClcV8djjH3HslIJ5qzKcnTM2KHkvK3dEUQftDjsszcs9l-gqOLA1u7vtybF7OHIRpee_5XEFssMyb1OrjxJm-cIHcZFBOFGdaStoSjC9DeYhM2i5PzCIsnZz43tONOBxwyb4oPvtoYldbqQ%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_Ptd5emdnRBsRlcxzbzYQi4i20maOi7kZgDeDeakNAN3K5tCLF9yrxECO9BKPBmb-ry570BncqqtWOPD9PRcVYCA5nxyE_vgkY27ABf29bV_j6trVE7O00FmGleWwPIQsogARsR3l4U7KmzjrhCqMyQ%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_NVbkp0urxzOb6gfPHhwN7Jfut5saumgbGrtOSefId9BO-BwzAY0ExsSWVAjbd9MWKmdKYg2nmdRVjWo4s0qIpkfHLFaw7jD_bRs2jqZsuK76XmJLXv3ZZxhG6DsBT91YJIKiiLajOOB6dJ5zFDUdOA%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_KPW_jRYnudg8NUox30ivbWlvnZ5Bar0JVtyiyQ4_qAAMYDdLtm0AYCJ1Jr4BbTmW4-Cprin8r_7sJxpM2jflnNbb-PcPBGxtL60obUexDFeCN1-1Msxj2pCh1_qVyzfE4UywUDB3Dr7d5DZKfm_gUU%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_DvoxTiJgLlazB_1OXJC578QI09EDTv6z2xGUu_NfKWQoXtqoHBNL6XXUEXzWSJdrQnFwSayiRFwcObsnhQ9oQiqwKOjtlIvxFYBZ563PiNnrDcIQaxDhGynrTLaHluZLbBgDj8lMslGFwU-VvM1uN4%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_LjHWbcPlpqGzME-Hz_V5pNrCrTROHldu8be1F8PnYXpw_SJhE0i44eSXbyuohjVBHLzNY9gt3fulbrwO_S-XVTI59ccrv6ZU3IjapZ0xLZDcL3D0sTpNNUdTf_mf_COILOk_1EM8JIPyZ1YlP3-YC4%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U6skZBErCfvziAEe1KmFErVtliqvRFhCEI176zYRX5ou6VFZ1m-mSAvRVbD5UXwctzpCrdYXRi02rRh_islUw67FCA8DXkyBdWmKkQYeQp4dJkQJw098OKVTJUgqs7zH19Px-K04j-nW_WLCpR6oTp5KC7KJH4cR4ZEyu0do9zTmg%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U61Ua6HoMpS4hl2Z339TdVrVSFD9XfI2Nx1Rsv_V712_D6mT65XXt2Gbj4vRaywo1_Sw63BIyaOzJvmDPeMjx1uUXpWFnFCd5gHeQbEwFCf5O-SIh9bp4daP9FtMk1VcGGh4GBcrWDRFsyMN86YA06qz73cqWxau9jhqIAeh5dkSI%3D)

[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U6_qlbPyjyKHOIWKJFVkog05WWajId1moLYJeKvQtNXsfwRk_AFxXWO9ZQkxYA2ZQypMehFgaL7zX30hQSIE4P0p1wNTMVzo207Njh6Opp2e6OJlmMtKZEwENGcSP6auw7puEBUxGsqzu34UncgOBtVgNSAlJ67j5EJ3Jk04Bzmu--XipNjP9rJSsr52UWPnU3)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U6IDzC9sV-Ts-sY3p_q2oDm_vKer34NOReawgaGamgdNDVBCvvAe6oKENT11kdcxKscetoEbMPlZTYFtrOO1H4_u0fGZczGSLC5h4PGY2QuwAqWaEv9abxMxubX_sushhbZeDGng__RNWE2tVajAbMqWRsmXZVR29a5Q-rcAcyrwZhoFdTwy7T2xG8woByxwov)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_JD4swmxIq8eXx-mvbLGozBCBZqLjj8FoVCwzY93uT6rxUE8Wwx245d33RxBfyTK1beNbFYcQrNu7Huy-q_kev33l2N9Wx-BPT-BXbT1hqWtP_-792OBcR31b_Db1eXSm5onTmj6h6B2_uES34IyDXw%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_e=-iECiQyGfSFQ1BE2cKw_ApW-0UCgILNxY1s6UAyfku7mKxBOsl1xsyxXQoVIU2U_OyR9oaJhZLpk6QwGkuAMpntpPtMKT-K5ZUoLRrKLLdo2Ysq6YP4e3e1zELUMp7U66WBYWLZalryTBtQVoKWR_FHh9Xw6R1KvUxB_Flc0TaWtKhijkVUjPbdhjmC0xDd0zIwW0_iaARUoM7HGfCEMsYC_q2gVdoXj7K694cCqEFI6W_kwSkjPK_gzU7KcTiEK0xPxImUQE-8Q34XsYkN_K4lcwg1Mwzu5IXLIioCCoZM%3D)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=5b2a79b0078a4b0fa88ba20601610db4&_t=VIhl9bpI_yfmkTjbEC-XzZghqH6wCnCoXDFpfaVE8aC2xLnn6WD8XmJpivcvvoa6IlvGIRopQ3YhhXrgVlEB5_sw7DQjHFtnQjn-x6GMXjA%3D)

But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. |
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k5LvK-SqbJDSS3vGqOxdiAFS6G9NaF8nUy3J1_73BTIZXYrabfrsqEe2pz5bVDqu0JKQhniNdKFLhwVlb649dRkLSibA0jk4yu5p5Jl0MJXwHPQ_FljGUxey76M0ISFP5yrZrcCy1SHVZU05aIoG2GV)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k4Ov758_yVnQHL_JT0Vmar8JroD8hxKqUIqfyDXz-FSyGHCzQ_AdMXmHe-1Bvu0Ru9C8YW_HWAdP7AFKFaHb2orqWFj3tiUM1QfO2f6LMGmAaTKeN5z2YMlU9icF6sco8o0i3VOgC27E_YkHAAb1Dmx) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k7yQMDt9RhoSMp4iwmT3b-HBxr2vlh8l5bp6PGQnr4iDg45U0ZcFHRKwOVdJiXSJ-bzQTwMcetbNQ8Hbu7WW6nhZYXfW09vj6L9hd8ET_6n70BBhq-q1NlEpczTlzgnrE_YdloCbDxtXbxEZ4kRzH8Q)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k4fSg6L79dezUm6PGFOt-DmefNMGev-JfEdSYfKlDpO-PgZDyulrraX6-6Q2Ee8JGMNyzPb-HrHcOMW7pCHDetNDlyO834NN08ehXpPneH-jUFhJn1Ns0-AOeLvhoq3I5YqjamJOSxT61GU4YuiMjXV)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k4Jinnzt1A_Ukmfn9XmwMKz8VtNM8986Vifad2sv_T6iTJ5t3oel9TEHvUEcXu2JZDgp2hOOwLV6A7QX_e2vJOIJT9bjO4PuBhP7GgxRMj1bL57TswKdEutVK8Az4vcprie1RcH7AfiPCUbpaX9eWIe)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79300e444ca846f89c94eb65fd5478d2&_e=OAAXMR9aUnjjGnfb8_c2YWiuQkYH5lDpHTwm0bMxDH156yJlwGSIiwVpRjKIBbhkT1B9J9-Je8o4x5uXXP5tPlKRwSu2ku4XXnsOvf5WDlJalMDzdO9wbyCFZgG4TeTrpZzbqGwg9RULAK5qXs87vliCWL0V9h6cJPpVONpxoWU9nwa26jp3iWQpuwCU0O80JbLYDIvTo86bPdBEei0ixfzhCR29RKOvLECaDg_X6k7xHMS5w7JKU8qfAbgEWlCPZ9DX4PQRxA-Ixq2JctyMQVUfSQe13giohRjSUcyqWdP_SsemP2v2-VmH0iGo4j5uHtz0Ke_708Jk8nFWyB_7zlZRU2xrtV2U9ddxNVWn3dS3sMlUBmFMtJRh9eI9sW_8)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=5f75468125&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friends,

Merry Christmas to you and your family! As we celebrate this most special day with those we love, I hope your day is filled with family, friends, and many blessings. May you also enjoy special memories of those no longer with us during this holiday.

I am so thankful this holiday season for my family, our Commonwealth, and this GREAT nation we call home! It is the honor of a lifetime to have served you in the Virginia Senate and to be able to continue to serve you in the halls of Congress. I look forward to being sworn-in on January 3rd!

May you have a healthy, safe, and blessed Christmas holiday today!

>From my family to yours,
Merry Christmas!

Jen

"Today in the town of David, a Saviour has been born to you: He is Christ the Lord."
\- Luke 2:11

name: American Briefing
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z379t7vvjae97df2viup8n7h1sfcgijj84ff765g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1g64o32chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi0m43glhnmjkhlplukme9ppqb3s7cil26o391cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1g64o32chh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9g2556k8b59gj9qgjkre7t4dl6fr383gqq9moe0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1g64o32chh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeacno7h6j7tal6c0vn7826257ejujfvs6vs2e00_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1g64o32chh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z64k670rd40jeoj3jmvh3aj7c4tvqlsig35cep48_rp22sh2s8i66pr2c1g64o32chh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0248%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=43h6LA%2fq%2boJDaWWDP6rnQw&sysid=1)
ACI - Giving Tuesday 2022 |
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44620%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Ukw%2bQefU4SNv%2b123rsMmw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44621%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pKKaQnx%2bk%2b4dJZ9aZC5pnA&sysid=1) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44622%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JOZ2gjAo9zXShxMRWD%2bahw&sysid=1)

This pledge will affirm your support for America’s guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44623%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2p1CZ2uNH7h4DS89lN5Msg&sysid=1)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I’m ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44624%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jxpYfgeaE9IXTK2RDgXxFw&sysid=1)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let’s head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44635%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A7foMAYak7N0mQd4yZTccA&sysid=1)

I’ve already completed mine--and I hope you’ll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2022 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0248%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=43h6LA%2fq%2boJDaWWDP6rnQw&sysid=1)

subject: Merry Christmas!

body:
Thank you for your support this year

|
---
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_s=9fd66e3c530b431e942074dcf094f58e&_t=6UZcEcJIjEyFoXcivYAK3leMRpINCcv_3nfNPHc16uPi_K3MU3nTLnyGBbE8jML4h_m7lPvMwmZhYPPBDosTebiqcC58N9QAS0Eyr1xqjEI%3D)

[ ](http://links.feenstraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=70b938be44d84e1197556ad813170f3c&_m=9fd66e3c530b431e942074dcf094f58e&_e=6dDkk3NWHI2fLn5bPsvM0H0HKoUjQAvNugQlXq2omK-GdPW8xGeUN64KcAtmDnIFCGD8hoewoHU4CBBRam99wdgJafihN-jDMouoHczktdWvTvD9F5uoJZODK5ehzvd7rkQGfDtZMdFg5FO5COxndH7usaXg_-HtBI3o5Iuy2JPhNGRKNjDFOGJGEfwcI9B9woEqxC14td0DRVx09hpE49OMEK-lo_OtE1vCgCVKEoU%3D) Dear Friends,

As we approach the end of the year, thank you for your continued support, and we wish you a very Merry Christmas.

This year has been challenging, but I am proud of the work we have done together to advance our shared values and goals. From fighting for lower taxes and a more robust economy to protecting our Second Amendment rights and defending the unborn, we have worked hard to improve our communities, **_which would not have been possible without all of my supporters._**

We have made great strides in the Republican Party and are **FINALLY** getting America back on the right track.

I am grateful for your support and the opportunity to serve you in Congress. I look forward to continuing our work together in the New Year.

I wish you and your family a very joyous holiday season!

Merry Christmas,

Congressman Feenstra

| Paid for by Feenstra for Congress

subject: The most wonderful time of year!

body:
Hey there Peter! It’s Wiley Nickel – I wanted to wish you a very Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas! This year has been full of surprises and a LOT of hard work, and now is the time we get to relax and spend a lot of time with our closest family and friends in the spirit of love and giving. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56409667/384892283/1668440331?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTY1ZTYxNi1hNjg0LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-O8ldDauCsRGCC_g5DLFfxkQiIYHJZ-GrNLBTT5f3dc=&emci=8eef237a-c374-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=9965e616-a684-ed11-9d7a-000d3a9eb913&ceid=28008880) Hey there, Peter! It’s Wiley Nickel – I want to wish you a very Happy Holidays and Merry Christmas! This year has been full of surprises and a LOT of hard work, and now is the time we get to relax and spend time with our closest family and friends. After the chaos of this year, it’s been so nice being home to celebrate this magical holiday season with Caroline and the kids. I hope you have a great holiday and a Merry Christmas if you celebrate! Happy holidays and merry Christmas!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b8d7357b-527e-4bfd-aa5a-06c78c0ad3a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My relationship to Christmas is frankly incoherent. My older siblings tell stories about me somehow convincing my Muslim parents to get Christmas trees for our immigrant family in the 70s, and in school throughout the 80s, I spent more than my share of afternoons singing Christmas carols in shopping malls across St. Louis with one or another choral ensemble.
On the other hand, I have grown to profoundly detest the consumerism that pervades contemporary celebrations of a holiday rooted in claims to seek peace, many by people living in an empire with centuries generations of imperial & genocidal war under its belt.
Ultimately, the reason I treasure this holiday is because of how it centers compassion, humanity, and the essential right to migrate. As an immigrant myself to a family that crossed the world twice seeking the opportunity to live and prosper in peace, I take quite seriously the story of a family giving birth to a newborn in a barn. Of course, in a country that so widely disrespects immigrant rights today, it is difficult to honor today's celebration with an entirely sincere smile.
Have a never written a Christmas song before, I am posting this rough take of a hook (which I recorded on my way to work this morning) in the hopes that you might write back with any suggestions, ideas, or concepts you might share to inform verses to accompany it.
[Listen now * 0:19](https://substack.com/redirect/43c65c5f-0896-4885-8db3-67098953a488?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=92859128&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6OTI4NTkxMjgsImlhdCI6MTY3MTk5MDkzMCwiZXhwIjoxNjc0NTgyOTMwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.nKqVXCHh0LrCeE3-A0x-c_thoxMPNZXxl_hOl0PF74A)
Merry Christmas and happy holidays, in whichever traditions you embrace! May the future bring our successors the peace, joy, and justice that so thoroughly elude our world today.
Paid subscribers can see a photo I took this morning, which might help explain why I am so excited this holiday season...

subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdBiuZ3AGFmUNjElItNQCmql9cJML7Hv8UeZuo9BNWFeYAkp7sP14kUIjL-pFDdI07n9mvkiTzul5rro7V1geguq7LJzdM6L3LaIiZQdTBeHd3SGiFduPQkFDMf8z62XmTrV0an8GiV97_oRZ8yR0xTW)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I 'm officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign over the next 4 weeks.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdDRmTjTWqx1iBy_igm66p-UhZ-t2caUoPEU5J7uFr5_5xmIJDB66xLSiDXbSd6F6SnmoOeqDnQhq2hyW0VwCfwMUB_BN3q94aOLREUV8mLBG7WRMvHJzjKsp7Jmmq8eiB1Wm0agTESypSZQc_N6Cis5)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdArlXzKU6KTAROAIpsXcjQq25EvEKrdJcWNQury5bzuYKyl8qga-tClvA1x8GZ8fWoV6CQOPcuajf3PV6-MGhiXFLQoD4rA6rD3tx9tUfag7qvF0DxRJagu1tHCQRGxHh_hWgfpUCwrVQPNayX1k97n)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdAwcp51mEy5JD4JuokwF9UJPnooYcrzIBCSb2FIf8XF93crRGAXMLTnu3zP-lSEcPq0FeXjhWQeI28kQSr9lOo4XZYDttjJNnkk3R6zlLsYh8yKF2hbo7kgmSfALBfpEAqeegdQvr61SxitfAB6CyNU)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he'll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I'll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden's radicalism and BREAK the Establishment's stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won 't fight for us...so we've got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdCVvN4MmptAD_6Pdw_EUTGbKOKG78qbnwDOu0ajNeOVsqRMl7AnGkIxyhthVtFOe2nVmmZc-TSUBm5LwjhRpqQ_nOO_BlQzd6znXWnpJSc87xucnEzsCeuJaVSwG3YsE5gWwGlm8SEJZJYNpMBSLb6D)**

**[Just $30--or anything you can afford--will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6beff7f2e7b04cd9a09dbbd0ebf75abe&_e=GUHNkxgLH_wA9LgF6wF-Ae9oS6CyFZvJMeqxphr9AaiuAMLzirIO9NkfEDEJFxlHTTf1U_pup00O5DSUri9avzaEmxtKn6Ae3Q6sk6y5uaTydO81ACG6XTDv1nKvYsrKsPpoX-oF-G6oDJ5CjzZj_0h2ad6FUHYJrynjn7O1pdDNoFW4voiq9F5EW4bdqm7qd5lOS7g9RloJWm-b092fYfZkBVXNpDLE0fAJEihjkVuljYzRQe-h6dw8_6n58Ro3mr9rV1800gPLuj06hocGM1D9sK38ea_1HYgnkhYCgztvN_CdJaxtJoWP6YWCc6n1)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Merry Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Today, the only oversight happening in my house will be about Christmas cookies and making sure my kids don’t leave wrapping paper all over the house.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15578%2E3422442%2E2K-H7g)
Merry Christmas to all who celebrate! I’m wishing everyone a joyous day full of laughter and celebration.
I’m looking forward to the year ahead and continuing to conduct oversight on special interests and big corporations. But for today, the only oversight happening in my house will be about Christmas cookies and making sure my kids don’t leave wrapping paper all over the house.
Happy Holidays!
Katie Porter

Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’m taking the Four Pillars Pledge—will you?
body:
|
---
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtbTBOOLjSdWQot_p1ba833eioSXgzBA2VWV1iLtfP-WOjiJqYs9f4Ib51rwX0UAjRl4NxoMaHnE1lDFvFcNcGmDfMSZVNGa5aMx7vezP00fUNCr4aB08txXFxVqPfJaDZfx8Pe4gvZDd5ItHgDC0djo)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtaYRtR_vyofqODH_TaOYvgXIQhp91Z4v1zk_0ZHAlny4bNYrFbIzP_1NDGDwp-jV0Jbe8CJq_86dzO6ZZO1eWpDQXUp1JKbYT8uWcL6b6t0Zmw4FZ6j8_iKTSolAz9UHuJaAyCp0mCEVTdlWtUDP_I0) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtb-AXJjuAg8tohHonbEOBt3EpydKaF6M8WqzT_f1PT3zfqZHXGGx4NkEmaNpUEtD-wRs_iSi7Z_JzZAbeZdV2sKUBBCQJ8DeN8lg2kcKjE7Ejrsb_0OfcuutmGn6BVrXEbqLJqi4xGbTONT64dn5xTv)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtYT4nkhpEcPNVIH85rZV3OPfJHirDbOa0nxN40-AXqsrF6VhYBRO3UFzMvG0rJwUj373VH6EPjI8SxFsZBiMg0L2dhdoxJWaC5VmLMxIenBes2UcZY4GTTvws7G4AFAcPQC99xP0zCFmNM_WBdJTdYj)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtYRfiOzTmOULEpiSIXzIpoTQEXyYaJGvx9ETfTabtuD29qUk5xmMcoAg-lv6QKza-d4ubR_ARsDO43KCvyKftNMQ_mWOZ_E0w6hxR3z9SPaOFf11hHGnyJ0rt9Ua8FIugmSRGRrgfrk15Bssk6w_22k)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=001c790064bd4feeb109d5e92f8814ce&_e=eOFGHIptAp6tQ89YAuZ5nlPvu6BCjx_m7tPfntnc20C1QE1Nc-9qMa5SULrU2sQTQhYzKkSagP2q_S_bRhH6iRt3scJn32af0kiGhYnYCsejtYZ9XXOQAAnO6Tp_0Jxq2J7K-7Osky3Nj5fcapfi4LCAcdWYFZ65fY5UZDbU_8Xgd2kac7Ak_dAIZZIz9aAfeX6JNXXE0_cc_bKK8NIWZKxdq-RVStPfRb54yVBeQtZvk7y-Shd0xLoz9XjdQffp1f4b5uWgerfbdSpmvx2lFekpfvEJJak6ii7SaHTRKotjqBItNMcy_zw4DPsl9Mi62A_R8hLpf8FPX1ScXw_yZgGvg06N3DdtZbaMc88Rk7VFsTR0xKUpu6EMwTBVBtjN)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

| [ America LAST: Biden Sends $8 Billion Of U.S. Taxpayer Money To Africa ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44632%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fqwIfz5vP8DtLmJubVkJNQ&sysid=1)
---
[ President Joe Biden spoke to African leaders at the U.S.-Africa Leaders Summit, where he announced yesterday that the United States will be sending $8 billion to South Africa in an attempt to close its coal power plants. If that wasn't enough, the United States also plans to commit $55 billion to Africa over the next three years. ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44633%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WeuipdYVVwVJLSubLE74vg&sysid=1)

subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nehls for Congress
body:
Wishing you and yours a great Christmas Day. Read more >>
| | | Friend, Hope your Christmas morning is off to a great start, and you’re enjoying some well-deserved time off with family and friends. **Before the day gets away from me, I just wanted to take a moment to wish you a very Merry Christmas!**
---
---
As I reflect on the challenges we’ve faced in 2022, I’d like to once again thank you for your encouragement, help, and support. I truly appreciate it more than words can express. _I’m looking forward to working with you in 2023_ _to build a stronger America._

Hope you have a great Christmas Day and a Happy New Year!

\- Troy E. Nehls
